Token Tracker — Token Usage Tracker for AI Agent CLIs
Automatically monitor token usage across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and more. Local-first, privacy-focused, and zero manual configuration.
Share a Token Tracker dashboard snapshot with token usage insights across models, projects, and time windows.
Auto-track AI CLI token usage with zero manual steps.
Matrix-style interface that highlights the signals you care about.
Universal AI CLI leaderboard to compare usage and rank.
Native support for Codex, Claude Code, and Gemini CLI.
AI CLI tools hide your usage data in obscure local files. TokenTracker aggregates them into a single, beautiful dashboard in real-time.
100% local processing. No prompts or code are ever collected.
